# Runtime Events Schema
*JSON schema reference for integrating third-party runtime events into Wiz Cloud Detection and Response from EDRs and other vendors.*

Category: enrichment

Wiz opens the door for third-party vendors to enhance their runtime events within Wiz Cloud Detection and Response. This includes EDRs and other vendors equipped with runtime capabilities.

## Supported cloud assets and identifier

The table below shows which cloud assets can be enriched with cloud events and the required identifier.

| Supported resources (entity name) | Required Identifier            |
| :-------------------------------- | :----------------------------- |
| All Wiz-supported cloud assets.   | All Wiz-supported provider IDs |

## Limitations

[External enrichments are subject to limitations](dev:limitations#external-enrichment-limitations).

### Cloud event retention and upload guidelines

Wiz retains events in its storage for a duration of 30 days. It's crucial to transmit security alerts, not raw events, as Wiz is not configured as a SIEM product.

- You can upload events as frequently as every 5 minutes.
- To avoid exceeding your quota, focus uploads on actionable alerts.
- Contact [win@wiz.io.](mailto:win@wiz.io.) for support and guidance if you come close to or hit the quota limit.

## Schema

The schema defines the JSON structure expected by Wiz's API. Understanding this schema is essential for creating valid payloads that will be properly processed and incorporated into Wiz.

```json Schema
{
  "$defs": {
    "asset": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "oneOf": [
        {
          "required": ["assetIdentifier"],
          "title": "assetLookupIdentifier"
        }
      ],
      "properties": {
        "analysisDate": {
          "format": "date-time",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "assetIdentifier": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/assetIdentifier"
        },
        "events": {
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/event"
          },
          "type": "array"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    "assetIdentifier": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "oneOf": [
        {
          "required": ["providerId"],
          "title": "assetIdentifierWithProviderId"
        },
        {
          "required": ["networkAddress", "cloudPlatform"],
          "title": "assetIdentifierWithNetworkAddress"
        },
        {
          "required": ["endpointUrl", "cloudPlatform"],
          "title": "assetIdentifierWithEndpointUrl"
        }
      ],
      "properties": {
        "cloudPlatform": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/cloudPlatform"
        },
        "endpointUrl": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "networkAddress": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "providerId": {
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    "cloudPlatform": {
      "enum": ["ACK", "AKS", "AWS", "Alibaba", "Azure", "AzureDevOps", "BitbucketCloud", "BitbucketDataCenter", "Cloudflare", "Databricks", "EKS", "Firemon", "GCP", "GKE", "GenericDB", "GitHub", "GitLab", "IBM", "Kubernetes", "LKE", "Linode", "MongoDBAtlas", "OCI", "OKE", "Okta", "OpenAI", "OpenShift", "OpenStack", "Snowflake", "Terraform", "Vercel", "Wiz", "vSphere"],
      "type": "string"
    },
    "dataSource": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "analysisDate": {
          "format": "date-time",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "assets": {
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/asset"
          },
          "type": "array"
        },
        "id": {
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "required": ["id", "assets"],
      "type": "object"
    },
    "event": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "commandLine": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "description": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "externalFindingLink": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "hash": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "id": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "ipAddress": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "mitreTacticIds": {
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/mitreTacticId"
          },
          "type": "array"
        },
        "mitreTacticNames": {
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/mitreTacticName"
          },
          "type": "array"
        },
        "mitreTechniqueIds": {
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/mitreTechniqueId"
          },
          "type": "array"
        },
        "mitreTechniqueNames": {
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/mitreTechniqueName"
          },
          "type": "array"
        },
        "name": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "path": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "principal": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "severity": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/eventSeverity"
        },
        "timestamp": {
          "format": "date-time",
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "required": ["externalFindingLink", "mitreTacticIds", "mitreTechniqueIds", "id", "timestamp", "name", "severity"],
      "type": "object"
    },
    "eventSeverity": {
      "enum": ["CRITICAL", "HIGH", "INFORMATIONAL", "LOW", "MEDIUM"],
      "type": "string"
    },
    "mitreTacticId": {
      "enum": ["TA0001", "TA0002", "TA0003", "TA0004", "TA0005", "TA0006", "TA0007", "TA0008", "TA0009", "TA0010", "TA0011", "TA0040", "TA0042", "TA0043"],
      "type": "string"
    },
    "mitreTacticName": {
      "enum": ["Collection", "Command and Control", "Credential Access", "Defense Evasion", "Discovery", "Execution", "Exfiltration", "Impact", "Initial Access", "Lateral Movement", "Persistence", "Privilege Escalation", "Reconnaissance", "Resource Development"],
      "type": "string"
    },
    "mitreTechniqueId": {
      "enum": [
        "T1001",
        "T1001.001",
        "T1001.002",
        "T1001.003",
        "T1003",
        "T1003.001",
        "T1003.002",
        "T1003.003",
        "T1003.004",
        "T1003.005",
        "T1003.006",
        "T1003.007",
        "T1003.008",
        "T1005",
        "T1006",
        "T1007",
        "T1008",
        "T1010",
        "T1011",
        "T1011.001",
        "T1012",
        "T1014",
        "T1016",
        "T1016.001",
        "T1018",
        "T1020",
        "T1020.001",
        "T1021",
        "T1021.001",
        "T1021.002",
        "T1021.004",
        "T1021.005",
        "T1021.006",
        "T1021.007",
        "T1025",
        "T1027",
        "T1027.001",
        "T1027.002",
        "T1027.003",
        "T1027.004",
        "T1027.005",

        "T1029",

    "mitreTechniqueName": {
      "enum": [
        "Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism",
        "Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism: Bypass User Account Control",
        "Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism: Elevated Execution with Prompt",
        "Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism: Setuid and Setgid",
        "Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism: Sudo and Sudo Caching",
        "Access Token Manipulation",
        "Access Token Manipulation: Create Process with Token",
        "Access Token Manipulation: Make and Impersonate Token",
        "Access Token Manipulation: Parent PID Spoofing",
        "Access Token Manipulation: SID-History Injection",
        "Access Token Manipulation: Token Impersonation/Theft",
        "Account Access Removal",
        "Account Discovery",
        "Account Discovery: Cloud Account",
        "Account Discovery: Domain Account",
        "Account Discovery: Email Account",
        "Account Discovery: Local Account",
        "Account Manipulation",
        "Account Manipulation: Add Office 365 Global Administrator Role",
        "Account Manipulation: Additional Cloud Credentials",
        "Account Manipulation: Device Registration",
        "Account Manipulation: Exchange Email Delegate Permissions",
        "Account Manipulation: SSH Authorized Keys",
        "Acquire Access",
        "Acquire Infrastructure",
        "Acquire Infrastructure: Botnet",
        "Acquire Infrastructure: DNS Server",
        "Acquire Infrastructure: Domains",
        "Acquire Infrastructure: Malvertising",
        "Acquire Infrastructure: Server",
        "Acquire Infrastructure: Serverless",
        "Acquire Infrastructure: Virtual Private Server",
        "Acquire Infrastructure: Web Services",
        "Active Scanning",
        "Active Scanning: Scanning IP Blocks",
        "Active Scanning: Vulnerability Scanning",
        "Active Scanning: Wordlist Scanning",
        "Adversary-in-the-Middle",
        "Adversary-in-the-Middle: ARP Cache Poisoning",
        "Adversary-in-the-Middle: DHCP Spoofing",
        "Adversary-in-the-Middle: LLMNR/NBT-NS Poisoning and SMB Relay",
        "Application Layer Protocol",
        "Application Layer Protocol: DNS",
        "Application Layer Protocol: File Transfer Protocols",
        "Application Layer Protocol: Mail Protocols",
        "Application Layer Protocol: Web Protocols",

      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "$id": "https://wiz.io/ingestionmodel.schema.json",
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "additionalProperties": false,  "properties": {
    "dataSources": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/dataSource"
      },
      "type": "array"
    },
    "integrationId": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "required": ["integrationId", "dataSources"],
  "title": "Wiz Ingestion Model",
  "type": "object"
}
```

## Schema fields

The schema fields define the structure and required information for submitting Runtime Events to Wiz. The following tables outline all available fields, their requirements, and descriptions to ensure your integration provides the necessary data for proper correlation with cloud resources (assets).

### Root Level Fields

| **Field**         | **Type** | **Required** | **Description**                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ----------------- | -------- | ------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **integrationId** | `String` | Required     | The unique ID for each Wiz integration.<ul><li>For WIN partners: You will get a dedicated integration ID towards completion of the development. Until then, please use the ID for Wiz customers.</li><li>For Wiz customers: Use `55c176cc-d155-43a2-98ed-aa56873a1ca1`.</li></ul> |
| **dataSources**   | `Array`  | Required     | Contains an array of data sources. Each data source is an object.                                                                                                                                        |

### Data Source Fields

`dataSources[]`

| **Field**        | **Type** | **Required** | **Description**                                                                                                                      |
| ---------------- | -------- | ------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **dataSourceId** | `String` | Required     | The ID that uniquely identifies cloud events within a tenant and integration ID. Can be subscription ID.                             |
| **analysisDate** | `String` | Optional     | The date and time when the scan was performed, in ISO 8601 format: `yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ`.                                           |
| **assets**       | `Array`  | Required     | List of assets included in the data source. Each asset is an object. [See supported assets](#supported-cloud-assets-and-identifier). |

### Asset Fields

`dataSources[].assets[]`

| **Field**           | **Type** | **Required** | **Description**                                                            |
| ------------------- | -------- | ------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **assetIdentifier** | `Object` | Required     | Contains identifiers for a specific asset.                                 |
| **networkAddress**  | `String` | Optional     | The IP address of the asset.                                               |
| **endpointURL**     | `String` | Optional     | The Endpoint URL of the asset.                                             |
| **events**          | `Array`  | Required     | Contains an array of events related to the asset. Each event is an object. |

### Asset Identifier Fields

`dataSources[].assets[].assetIdentifier`

| **Field**         | **Type** | **Required** | **Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ----------------- | -------- | ------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **cloudPlatform** | `String` | Required     | The cloud platform that was scanned. Possible values: "AWS", "Azure", "GCP", "OCI", "Alibaba Cloud", "Linode".                                                                                                                                       |
| **providerId**    | `String` | Required     | A unique identifier assigned to a specific cloud asset by the cloud service provider when the asset is created, allowing for the identification and differentiation of the asset within the cloud computing ecosystem. ARN—AWS, Resource group—Azure |

### Events

`dataSources[].assets[].events[]`

| **Field**               | **Type**          | **Required** | **Description**                                                                                                                                                              |
| ----------------------- | ----------------- | ------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **id**                  | `String`          | Required     | The unique ID of the discovered event.                                                                                                                                       |
| **timestamp**           | `ISO 8601 string` | Required     | The timestamp of the event.                                                                                                                                                  |
| **name**                | `String`          | Required     | The name of the event, for example, "GDPR - Personal Sensitive".                                                                                                             |
| **description**         | `String`          | Optional     | A description of the event.                                                                                                                                                  |
| **externalFindingLink** | `String`          | Required     | A link to the source of the event.                                                                                                                                           |
| **severity**            | `String`          | Required     | The severity of the event. Possible values: "None", "Low", "Medium", "High", "Critical". If omitted, defaults to "Medium".                                                   |
| **mitreTacticIds**      | `Array[String]`   | Required     | At least one value must be present in the array. [View the list of Mitre Tactic IDs](https://attack.mitre.org/tactics/enterprise/).                                          |
| **mitreTechniqueIds**   | `Array[String]`   | Required     | At least one value must be present in the array. Wiz supports **V13**. [View the list of Mitre Technique IDs](https://attack.mitre.org/versions/v13/techniques/enterprise/). |
| **commandLine**         | `String`          | Optional     | The text of the command line that triggered the event.                                                                                                                       |
| **path**                | `String`          | Optional     | The Path of the file that triggered the event.                                                                                                                               |
| **hash**                | `String`          | Optional     | SHA1 hash of a malicious file related to the event.                                                                                                                          |
| **principal**           | `String`          | Optional     | A unique identifier assigned to the actor of this event: ARN—AWS, Resource group—Azure                                                                                       |
| **ipAddress**           | `String`          | Optional     | The IP Address of the Actor.                                                                                                                                                 |

## Example

This example JSON payload demonstrates how to properly format cloud security events for submission to Wiz. It illustrates the practical implementation of the event schema, showing required fields and their proper usage for reporting security findings across cloud assets. The example includes proper formatting for MITRE ATT&CK technique references and demonstrates how to include contextual information about detected threats.

```json Example
{
  "integrationId": "GUID-Provide-by-Wiz",
  "dataSources": [
    {
      "id": "GUID",
      "analysisDate": "2023-09-11T16:50:00Z",
      "assets": [
        {
          "assetIdentifier": {
            "cloudPlatform": "AWS",
            "providerId": "arn:aws:ec2:us-east-2:1222222228:instance/i-03d0db38ed7f5555b"
          },
          "events": [
            {
              "id": "29652973393344",
              "timestamp": "2024-01-15T09:34:31.810Z",
              "name": "CollectionMac",
              "description": "A process appears to be collecting information from this host, possibly via some automated search routines. Review the activity to see if it is expected.",
              "externalFindingLink": "https://yourlink.com",
              "severity": "HIGH",
              "mitreTacticIds": ["TA0011", "TA0009"],
              "mitreTechniqueIds": ["T1134.001"],
              "commandLine": "curl --connect-timeout 3 https://www.google.com",
              "path": "/usr/bin/curl",
              "hash": "159313131618538785550100365493378107;llkl2666",
              "principal": "arn:aws:iam::user/blabla",
              "ipAddress": "127.0.0.1"
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```
